name: Rotel Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 10 oz ROTEL Tomatoe with Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Add the melted vegetable shortening, buttermilk, beaten egg, and finely chopped jalapeno to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Fold in the diced ROTEL tomato with green chili.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking dish.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cornbread to cool before serving.
